name: LinkFinder AI — LinkedIn Profiles → Full Scrape

parameters.content:
## 🔑 API Key Setup

Find your API key in the **API Access** section of your [linkfinderai.com](https://linkfinderai.com) account.

Then replace `{{Insert-api-key}}` in every **Linkfinder** node with your actual key.

parameters.formDescription: Extract full data from LinkedIn profiles — email, mobile, experience, connections and more.

nodes.name: → Connect Your CRM Here
nodes.notes:
📤 Connect your destination here:
• HubSpot → 'Create/Update Contact'
• Pipedrive → 'Create Person'
• Salesforce → 'Create Record'
• Airtable, Notion, HTTP webhook...
